Threshold:
reason threshold 75 is chosen as the optimal threshold for the CV parser evaluation because it provides a good balance
between precision and recall, resulting in a high F1-Score of 85.71% and an overall accuracy of 83.33%. At this threshold, 
the model correctly identifies 15 true positives while minimizing false positives (2) and false negatives (3), 
which indicates that it is effective at distinguishing between relevant and irrelevant CVs
without being too lenient or too strict.
